heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1138d Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1138d, , as added , , , related to technical assistance and coordination contract, prior to repeal by , title VII, § 702, , , 1803, effective .Pub.
